y: Trying new things helps us learn and grow.
Being open to new experiences builds our confidence.
Every new activity is a chance to discover something exciting.
eg: We try a new food during snack time.
We explore a new toy or material that we have not seen before.
We participate in a new activity with support from an adult.
We try sitting in a new spot during group time.
We explore a new space with a trusted person nearby.
We try a new movement or action during music or play.
